docket_entries.description: EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT SANCHEZ, CYNTHIA K AN INDIVIDUAL
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT SANCHEZ, CYNTHIA K AN INDIVIDUAL
VERIFICATION BY LANDLORD REGARDING RENTAL ASSISTANCE- UNLAWFUL DETAINER (TRANSACTION ID # 79189907) FILED BY PLAINTIFF VERTEX PROPERTY GROUP

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 79189907), PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF VERTEX PROPERTY GROUP SERVED MAR-20-2026, PERSONAL SERVICE, NO SERVICE FEE AS TO DEFENDANT SANCHEZ, CYNTHIA K AN INDIVIDUAL

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 79189907), PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF VERTEX PROPERTY GROUP SERVED MAR-21-2026, PRE-JUDGEMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS (TRANSACTION ID # 79189907) AS TO DEFENDANT SANCHEZ, CYNTHIA K AN INDIVIDUAL
DECLARATION OF DAVID P WASSERMAN RE COPY OF LEASE AGREEMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 79189907) FILED BY PLAINTIFF VERTEX PROPERTY GROUP

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VERTEX PROPERTY GROUP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SANCHEZ, CYNTHIA K AN INDIVIDUAL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 555 EDDY STREET, UNIT NUMBER 9, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94109, LEASE FORFEITED, ***JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ALL OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INCLUDING TENANTS, SUBTENANTS IF ANY, AND NAMED CLAIMANTS IF ANY*** SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 79189907)

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF VERTEX PROPERTY GROUP AS TO DEFENDANT SANCHEZ, CYNTHIA K AN INDIVIDUAL DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
